questionHtml: Calculate the maximum height risen by the centre of the ball.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1
Rebound speed is halved so energy less by a factor of 4 ✓
Hence height is 954 =23.8 «cm» ✓

ALTERNATIVE 2
Use of conservation of energy / 12 × 0.800 × 2.162 = 0.800 × 9.8 × h
OR

Use of proper kinematics equation (e.g. 0 = 2.162 − 2 × 9.8 × h) ✓

h = 23.8 «cm» ✓


Allow ECF from b(i)

meta.title: Calculate the maximum height risen by the centre of the ball.
